    Current gimmick:
    Lilian Garcia
    Age:

    Personal Data

    19.08.1966

    Tidbits

    • ausgebildete SÃ€ngerin
    • hatte eine eigene Radioshow in South Carolina
    • war von August 1999 bis September 2009 und von Dezember 2011 bis Juli 2016 feste Ringsprecherin bei WWE

    • Help and formula
    Latest comments of the CAGEMATCH inmates
    Djoxxys wrote on 22.04.2026:
    [5.0] "She was alright, but I never really understood the hype around Lilian Garcia. I saw her at my first live event, but she didn't leave a lasting impression. I can understand why she's adored by the American public. Perhaps, as a Frenchman, she resonates with me less."
    2pt0EcoBoostFusion wrote on 24.10.2024:
    [8.0] "I am a huge fan of Lilian Garcia both as a wrestling personality and as a ring announcer. To say that I am ecstatic about seeing her return to Monday Night RAW full-time as a ring announcer and replacing Samantha Irvin (who is amazing in her own right at the ring announcing job) is definitely true. I always admired how she put emphasis into announcing names like Triple H and Undertaker, so to see her again in the WWE is wonderful and I love it. Her podcast, Chasing Glory, is also worth a listen if you haven't already, I used to listen to that podcast every week in 2018 and I would do it again if I had the time to listen to 1+ hour long podcasts. She's not perfect at ring announcing, but I'm a fan, so I think this 8 is well deserved."
    Minion Garcia wrote on 17.07.2024:
    "Her voice defined a generation. Was she the best ring announcer? Maybe! For me she will always be my number one choice. I really have nothing bad to say about her performances."
    MattHall wrote on 14.07.2023:
    [9.0] "She had a few botches then and there, but her voice is very iconic, especially in the last 15 to 20 years."
    Ruthless Attitude wrote on 27.06.2023:
    [8.0] "Great announcer despite a few gaffes here or there and seems like a genuinely lovely person and very attractive and classy too. Her most memorable moments though is the emotional powerful singing after the 9/11 tragedy and her hilarious interview with The Rock."
    Giantfan1980 wrote on 29.05.2023:
    [5.0] "Good enough as the SmackDown! announcer back in the day but she had a habit of bobbling her lines. For example the 2006 Royal Rumble."
    cpatchj wrote on 02.04.2022:
    [4.0] "Eh. Lilian seems like a really lovely person, but she was not the best ring announcer. She just made too many mistakes."
    HopelessHelena wrote on 01.11.2021:
    "Lovely ring announcer, great attitude and such a classy presence to her. She was always fun when involved in segments with the in-ring talent and seemed to have a great time with anything WWE threw at her."
    juiceisloose wrote on 27.08.2021:
    [3.0] "Not the best ring announcer at all. Sure, she knows how to excite the crowd especially when announcing big names but she makes mistakes all the time. She also forces her voice too much sometimes and sounds unnatural. Easily replaceable and is not memorable by any means. I much prefer Chimel, Finkel or Justin Roberts."
    JEK 1991 wrote on 27.02.2020:
    [10.0] "Always like that sound of her voice. Always exciting to watch. She had a couple of matches in her career as well as a story angle with Viscera. She is very entertaining to listen to. Also was a fan of her work. She also can sing and has produced music for WWE. Excellent 17 years she had in the WWE."
    KyleEnjoysWrestling wrote on 04.08.2019:
    [4.0] "For the most part, Lillian has just been.... fine. Most of her calls are standard & I don't think she ever had the passion that we saw from others. She's known to botch a time or two, which I largely don't hold against her. But it still seems like it comes from a general disinterest in the wrestling product that she may have. I think someone like Greg Hamilton now does a far better job than Lillian ever did."
    ZestyZuluWarrior wrote on 01.05.2019:
    [8.0] "She was the announcing voice for a majority of my wrestling viewership while growing up.. She had occasional botches which takes her rating down but I truly think she was a staple of the WWE product for many years. A very good singer as well. Today, she runs a pretty good podcast."
    La Trina wrote on 12.11.2015:
    [8.0] "Lilian Garcia is a lovely lady, and her ring announcing is pretty good, she has a strong voice and a friendly feel to her. I do think younger girls like JoJo and Dasha Fuentes might outshing her pretty soon though."
    PWC wrote on 21.06.2015:
    [6.0] "This girl used to be my favorite ring announcer growing up and there's no denying Lilian Garcia has a powerful set of lungs but, she's been botching wrestler names ever since her first "retirement" in 2009 and was actually given a proper goodbye compared to many other WWE Divas out there but, ever since she's been back she's just been getting worse and worse as an announcer."
    KKorppu wrote on 15.09.2012:
    [2.0] "Unconsistent level of performance and is average at best. Does nothing to be better than the rest and is easily expendable."
    www.CAGEMATCH.net - Â© 2001-2026 Philip Kreikenbohm - Site Notice (German)
